hero.title: SKY LIFE SCIENCES SOLUTIONS
hero.desc: We provide exceptional analytical solutions to solve the toughest Research and Development challenges in Pharmaceutical, Biotech and Life sciences companies with a wide range of high quality, sustainability as well as innovative next-generation Laboratory products.

sales.title: Delivering Intelligent Manufacturing Solutions
sales.subtitle: We provide end-to-end technology solutions from research and development through pilot plants and commercial manufacturing, helping organizations accelerate innovation, improve efficiency, and adopt next-generation manufacturing technologies.

solutions.title: Continuous Manufacturing
points: Replacing traditional batch processes with continuous systems to increase safety, reliability, and scale-up velocity.

solutions.title: Flow Chemistry Solutions
points: Patented channel structures enabling high mass transfer, rapid temperature regulation, and highly automated chemistry.

solutions.title: Advanced Separation Technologies
points: Membrane-based continuous separation solutions to handle demanding liquid extraction and emulsion breaks.

solutions.title: Continuous Crystallization
points: Multi-stage systems providing exceptional crystal purity, consistent growth kinetics, and stable scales.

solutions.title: Sustainability & Green Chemistry
points: Low-footprint designs aimed at minimizing raw material usage, waste generation, and solvent consumption.

solutions.title: Engineering & Consulting
points: Comprehensive engineering support from basic feasibility and process optimization up to plant commissioning.

aboutUs.description:
Engineering the Future of Smart Manufacturing

Sky Lifesciences Solutions is a technology-driven organization focused on bringing next-generation manufacturing solutions to the pharmaceutical, chemical, agrochemical, and specialty chemical sectors.

We bridge the gap between traditional manufacturing and the factories of the future by integrating:
Continuous Manufacturing 

Flow Chemistry,
Process Intensification,  
Complete Lab Setup,  
Digital Manufacturing,  
Green Chemistry,  
Industry 4.0 Solutions & More  

Through strategic partnerships with global technology leaders and our deep industry expertise, we help organizations improve productivity, quality, safety, and sustainability.

director.name: Mr. Bijapuri Shylender Kumar
director.biography:
With over two decades of experience in the pharmaceutical, biotechnology, life sciences, and advanced manufacturing industries, Bijapuri Shylender has established himself as a trusted leader in driving innovation through advanced technologies, strategic partnerships, and sustainable manufacturing solutions.

His professional journey has been defined by a commitment to helping organizations adopt next-generation technologies that improve efficiency, scalability, product quality, and operational excellence. Through extensive experience working with leading global organizations, research institutions, and manufacturing companies, he has developed deep expertise in continuous manufacturing, flow chemistry, process intensification, advanced analytical technologies, and scientific business development.

At Sky Life Sciences Solutions, he leads the company's vision of accelerating the adoption of intelligent manufacturing technologies across the pharmaceutical, specialty chemical, agrochemical, and life sciences sectors. Under his leadership, the company has built strong collaborations with globally recognized technology providers and continues to support organizations in implementing future-ready manufacturing solutions.

His areas of expertise include:

• Continuous Manufacturing Technologies
• Flow Chemistry Solutions
• Process Development & Scale-Up
• Advanced Separation Technologies
• Biopharmaceutical Solutions
• Process Intensification
• Green Chemistry & Sustainability
• Technology Commercialization
• Strategic Partnerships & Business Development

A strong advocate of innovation and sustainability, he believes that the future of manufacturing lies in the convergence of continuous processing, artificial intelligence, automation, advanced analytics, and environmentally responsible technologies. His focus remains on helping organizations achieve safer operations, higher productivity, faster development cycles, and sustainable growth.

Beyond technology adoption, he actively contributes to industry advancement through participation in leading conferences, exhibitions, technical forums, and collaborative innovation platforms. His efforts continue to foster meaningful partnerships between academia, research organizations, technology providers, and manufacturing industries.

Under his guidance, Sky Life Sciences Solutions has earned recognition for its contributions to continuous manufacturing, process innovation, flow chemistry, and technology-driven transformation. The company remains committed to empowering organizations with world-class solutions that enable smarter, safer, and more efficient manufacturing.

His long-term vision is to position Sky Life Sciences Solutions as a leading partner for intelligent manufacturing transformation, helping industries embrace the next generation of smart, data-driven, and sustainable production technologies.

"True innovation happens when technology, expertise, and collaboration come together to solve real-world challenges. At Sky Life Sciences Solutions, our mission is to empower organizations with the tools, knowledge, and partnerships needed to build a smarter, safer, and more sustainable future."

— Bijapuri Shylender
Founder & Director
Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP
achievements: Pioneered flow chemistry systems integration in India
Over 20+ years of technical advisory in chemical process automation
Keynote speaker at Agrochemicals R&D Summit and ChemExpo

products.name: Corning Nebula™ Education Kits
products.desc:
Corning® Advanced-Flow™ Reactor (AFR)  
Technologies and Products
Corning Advanced-Flow Reactors are industry-leading, 
disruptive innovations that can help change the way 
chemicals are made. AFR enables inherently safer, efficient 
continuous manufacturing while significantly reducing 
cost, footprint, and environmental impact.
Corning provides high quality product and process 
solutions for the seamless scale-up from lab to 
commercial mass productions of pharmaceutical 
intermediates, fine and specialty chemicals, as well  
as new material synthesis.
Corning Nebula™ Education Kits enable colleges and 
universities to provide students in chemistry, chemical 
engineering, and related majors with inherently safer 
equipment to become proficient in flow chemistry  
and flow reactor operation.
Corning is one of the world’s leading innovators in material 
science. For more than a century, we have applied our 
unparalleled expertise in specialty glass, ceramics, and 
optical physics to develop products that have created  
new industries and transformed people’s lives

to fit with Corning’s G1 reactor

products.name: Development Scale Liquid-Liquid/Gas-Liquid Separators
products.desc:
Efficiently separate liquids with our bench top to plant scale liquid liquid separator. Easy to use tools for chemists.

Features
Bench top to plant scale Our devices are well-characterized and directly scalable from lab to pilot to production . Separate emulsions with ease Instead of using agitation to form microdroplets, we improve mixing by using a flow pattern that has a large surface area, thus avoiding emulsions that generally cause separation issues. Existing emulsions tend to break as they encounter the membrane. Independent of density The operating principle behind the technology is based on a liquid’s wettable nature, so it works with any liquid-liquid system regardless of their density difference. Excellent chemical compatibility Machined in materials with excellent chemical resistance, Zaiput separators work with a wide range of organic solvents, in acidic and basic solutions. Easy usage and maintenance Plug and play functionality at all scales. Continuous operation for batch /flow chemistry Our devices can be easily used and integrated within either a batch process or a continuous one.

products.name: Production Scale Separators & Extraction Platforms
products.desc:
Liquid Liquid continuous extraction platforms for reaction workup. Improve phase separation quality and extraction efficiency

Features
Batch reactors are commonly underutilized by companies that rely on them as both reaction and extraction vessels. They are the most valuable asset in a plant, capable of producing APIs, intermediates, and other products and yet we often don’t use them to their full capacity so that we can squeeze a workup or quench into the same vessel. This underutilization is compounded across the number of reactors in a plant, leading to tens of millions of sunk cost not generating the best potential returns. Operators and plant managers waste thousands of hours every year optimizing mixing and settling conditions, waiting for mixing to occur, waiting for emulsions to settle & watching phase interfaces while a reactor drains. All of this is wasted time that can be better utilized both in terms of people and assets. Zaiput improves plant productivity by taking the workup out of the reactor. Instead, the workup is carried out in-line by pumping directly out of solvent storage and teeing into the product before static mixing elements. Right away, this allows plant operators to double the capacity of their reactors while taking less time to carry out their extraction. The static mixers are specifically designed to give full mass transfer while the high throughput membrane separator simplifies phase separation. Brought together you get a fast, efficient extraction in less time. Importantly for CDMOs, this will allow companies to bring in more projects and larger projects than their current capacity allows, which will directly translate to the bottom line. The technology is applicable across a wide range of solvent systems and can be easily implemented, with minor adjustments, from process to process. Zaiput helps engineers and plant managers hit their continuous improvement and efficiency goals across a broad range of key parameters. From increasing product output to bringing in more projects and reducing loss from difficult separations, Zaiput helps you accomplish ambitious plant improvements. If you’re interested in any of these benefits or curious about others, email us at Sales@Zaiput.com .
products.technicalOverview: Europe: SalesEurope@Zaiput.com Americas: SalesUSA@Zaiput.com +1 (617) 714-9806 x704 Global: Sales@Zaiput.com +1 (617) 714-9806 Notice: JavaScript is required for this content.

products.name: Multistage Extraction
products.desc:
Counter-current extraction platforms for enhanced extraction efficiency. Powered by Zaiput's membrane-based phase separators

Features
Our lab scale platform (MS-10) is the only existing tool for bench liquid-liquid counter-current extraction process development Minimal internal volume ~3ml per stage at MS-10 scale Easily scalable to pilot ( MS-200 ) and production ( MS-3000 or MS-40K ) Easy to use and clean Simple to add/remove extraction stages Addresses the most difficult extractions High extraction efficiency Provides a continuous solvent extraction solution
products.technicalOverview: Contact us if you need more than 5 stages. Platforms can be easily connected together. Part Number MS10-5 Width 500 mm (19.7 inches) Depth 400 mm (15.7 inches) Height 155 mm (6.1 inches) Total flow rate 0-10 ml/min Wetted parts: Separators ETFE, PFA, FEP, PTFE Tubing/ flow sensors PFA Interstage pumps FFMK, PVDF Ports 1/4-28 Flat bottom Max temperature of operation 80°C Hold-up volume per stage ~2 ml

products.name: Zaiput TWR reactor for heterogeneous catalysis
products.desc:
Continuous Reactor for Hydrogenations with excellent heat and mass transfer, easily scalable from lab to plant

Features
Direct scalability from Lab to Plant scale Our devices are directly scalable from lab to pilot to production due to the scaling geometry factor which maintains residence time and performance constant across scales. Modularity & Configuration Customization The reactor components (“blocks”) are modular layers which can be arranged in a custom order to build the perfect reactor configuration (“tower”) for any type of chemistry. Safe Continuous Operation Our devices drastically reduce dead volume making the process safer while minimizing footprint and reagents consumption. High Efficiency & Control Our devices can boost performance due to optimal heat and mass transfer. This allows to improve catalyst usage and eliminate hot spots.

Applications
The Zaiput reactor can be used to carry out many different hydrogenation reactions, as well as other classes of heterogeneously catalyzed reactions.

products.name: Crystallization
products.desc:
Zaiput Continuous Crystallization for superior crystal quality attributes and seamless lab-to-plant scalability.

Features
Important Features: Superior Plug Flow Characteristics The 11 connected tanks in series offer unprecedented plug flow characteristics within one unique device. No Need for Transfer Lines The tanks are all connected, thus there is no need to worry about transfer lines or fouling. Minimal Internal Volume Our devices have a small internal volume to minimize footprint, reagent consumption, and material costs during development. Continuous Operation Our devices can boost productivity and can be easily used and integrated within either a batch process or a continuous one. Other Advantages: Excellent Supersaturation Control & Fast Mixing The innovative impeller design and small internal volume of each tank offer fast mixing and very tight control on supersaturation conditions, improving your CQAs. Excellent Temperature Control The innovative design offers very tight control on the temperature within each tank to improve your CQAs. Chemical Compatibility Machined in materials with excellent chemical resistance, Zaiput crystallizers work with a wide range of organic solvents, in acidic and basic solutions. Easy Usage and Maintenance Plug and play functionality at all scales. Rapid Scaling Processes can be optimized at the lab scale and then directly scaled to production quickly thanks to the scaling geometry factor which maintains residence time and performance constant across scales.

products.name: Partition Chromatography
products.desc:
Continuous Liquid Liquid Partition Chromatography for separation of chemical species, powered by Zaiput's membrane-based separators

Features
• Continuous Liquid-Liquid Partition Chromatography | Zaiput Continuous Liquid-Liquid Partition Chromatography No solid stationary phase –> Low CAPEX & OPEX
• Ease of process development
• Scalable from Lab to Plant
• Description
• How It Works
• Applications
• Literature
• Ordering Information

Applications
Separation of Chiral Molecules Separation of Natural products Separation of Isomers Purification of Peptides or Oligonucleotides CLL-PC allows separation of chemical specie leveraging differences in partitioning of the species not two different liquid phases. Applications are across a wide spectrum, in the literature partition chromatography has been applied in several areas such as separation of chiral molecules, natural products , isomers in general. The Zaiput unique approach to continuous Partition Chromatography has two key features : No need of density difference between the liquid phases, thus expanding application space No moving parts, thus providing robust industrial solution

products.name: Back Pressure Regulators
products.desc:
Enhance your process efficiency with a back pressure regulator that offers metal-free wetted parts and accurate, clog-resistant multiphase flow.

Features
Metal-free wetted parts Maximum pressure: 2 MPa (290 psi) Very accurate and precise (1%) Error < 1% across flow rates of 0-1000ml/min Adjustable set point Users can simply set any pressure for the BPRs by adjusting the pressure of the compressed air chamber Excellent for gas-liquid streams Zaiput’s BPRs are designed to function with a stream containing gas, liquid, or multiphase. Robust to clogging Our devices eliminate extremely small orifices, which can cause clogging and over-pressurizing.

Applications
The internal parts of Zaiput BPRs are made of polymers. Therefore, the recommended operating temperature is below 130 ˚C. For any application at higher temperatures, consult our service team for a customized solution.

products.name: IKA Flow
products.desc:
Flow chemistry made easy and affordable with IKA FLOW. Its secret: Unlike other commercially available flow chemistry equipment, you just purchase the necessary part of the flow chemistry apparatus.

The portable IKA FLOW is an attachment that forms a flow chemistry reactor in combination with your IKA magnetic stirrer RCT digital. In addition, it has been designed to be used with any fume hood gas source (with a 6 mm pressure tubing and an adaptor to typical fume hood gas supplies) such as compressed air or nitrogen.

IKA FLOW’s scope of delivery includes in addition to the attachment, a glass bottle, a mixing chip, support screws, three on-and-off valves, a heating block, four disc reactors, and a labeled tubing set.

Max. Working Pressure: 137 kPa
Working Pressure: Pressure of the gas in solvent bottle
Max. Working Temperature: 100 °C

Capillaries
Capillary 1: Ø 0.125 mm × 50 mm
Capillary 2: Ø 0.125 mm × 100 mm
Capillary 3: Ø 0.18 mm × 50 mm
Capillary 4: Ø 0.25 mm × 100 mm

Overall Dimensions
Dimensions (W × H × D): 250 × 400 × 350 mm
Permissible Ambient Temperature: 5 – 40 °C

products.name: ElectraSyn 2.0 Package
products.desc:
ElectraSyn 2.0 is a three-in-one device that runs electrosynthesis, cyclic voltammetry (CV), and room temperature stirring. Its beginner-friendly features allow synthetic chemist to run simple CV and explore the substrate’s electrochemical properties; set up constant current or constant voltage reactions in the most intuitive way.

We constantly strive to further optimize our devices for you. That is why our development never stops. The device keeps evolving with software development which enables state-of-art functionalities benefitting scientific discovery. Accessories are widely available in order to support the expanded functionalities.

The IKA ElectraSyn App (available for both iPhone and Android) enables reaction and CV experiment monitoring, data transmitting, and various other functions.
products.technicalOverview:
ElectraSyn flow
Complete system
Nine combinable half cells with 6 different standard electrodes: 2x graphite, 2x glass-carbon, 2x nickel, 1x lead, 1x lead-bronze, 1x copperr
Special electrodes made of gold, platinum, stainless steel or boron-doped diamond (BDD) available on request
Product fully recyclable
Electro-organic synthesis current infinitely variable
Modular and compact system, ideal for R&D
Cell division by proton-conducting / cation-conducting diaphragm

products.name: Super Metering Pump SMP
products.desc:
Features
High accuracy: Discharge precision of ±0.1% or better across the specified flow range — even more accurate than a flowmeter. Consistent flow: Maintains a steady flow rate despite varying discharge pressures. Proportional control: Flow rate is directly proportional to pump speed. Pulse-free: Reciprocating mechanism ensures smooth, pulse-free performance.

Applications
Line mixing & emulsification: Enables instantaneous mixing/homogenization in feed lines without batch systems. Precision coating: Ensures uniform coatings (dip/roll) with no pulsation, bubbles, or pressure fluctuation issues. Precision cleaning, spraying & spray drying: Stable discharge regardless of back-pressure variations, ideal for viscous environments. Additive feeding to extruders: Delivers consistent additive/foaming agent dosing, resulting in uniform particle sizes. Dosing lines: Achieves highly precise dosing when paired with servo motor position control. -->
products.technicalOverview: Metal-free specification: Suitable for corrosive liquids or iron-free applications. Precision feeding unit “Iretaro”: A mobile, tank-integrated SMP system with control board for flexible operations. LCD Injector: Precisely feeds liquefied CO₂ for plastic foaming, with temperature regulation. Portable unit: Ready-to-use SMP (HYM model) with motor, speed controller, and touchscreen interface. Control system: Dedicated software for managing up to 5 pumps remotely via PC. --> 📄 Catalog Download (PDF)

products.name: Sky Life Sciences Solutions - Complete Product Catalog
products.desc:
Sky Life Sciences Solutions-offers advanced technologies for continuous flow chemistry, pharmaceutical process development, and industrial-scale manufacturing. Our portfolio includes Corning flow reactors, process development systems, dosing lines, Zaiput liquid-liquid and gas-liquid separators, extraction platforms, heterogeneous catalysis reactors, crystallization systems, partition chromatography solutions, back pressure regulators, pumps, analytical tools, and biopharmaceutical processing equipment. These solutions help pharmaceutical, chemical, and life sciences organizations improve process efficiency, scalability, safety, product quality, and manufacturing performance from laboratory research through commercial production.


You can view/download our complete catalog for 2026 From here!

products.name: Dosing Lines Product
products.desc:
Dosing Lines
A consistent and pulseless flow is key for flow chemistry. 
Corning can provide a suitable dosing system including 
flow control and safety valve for Low-Flow to G4 reactors.
Key Features
• Include electrical supply and human interface device  
   (either locally or integrated in customer Decentralized  
   Control System) 
• Engineered dosing lines 
• Highly flexible 
• High chemical durability 
• Mass transfer 100X better* 
• Heat transfer 1000X better* 
• Reaction volume 1000X lower* 
• Residence time distribution 50X better*

dynamicSections.title: Vision
dynamicSections.text: “To become the preferred global partner for intelligent manufacturing solutions, enabling industries to embrace continuous processing, artificial intelligence, digitalization, and green technologies to achieve operational excellence and sustainability.”

dynamicSections.title: Mission
dynamicSections.text: “At Sky Lifesciences Solutions, our mission is to empower industries with advanced continuous manufacturing, flow chemistry, process intensification, AI-enabled process optimization, and sustainable technologies that accelerate innovation, improve product quality, enhance safety, and reduce environmental impact.”

privacy-policy.content:
Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP respects your privacy and is committed to protecting any personal information that you provide while visiting our website. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect information obtained through our website and related services.

By accessing or using this website, you agree to the terms outlined in this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with any part of this policy, please discontinue use of the website.

Information We Collect

When you visit our website, we may automatically collect certain non-personal information, including but not limited to your IP address, browser type, operating system, device information, pages visited, referral sources, and general website usage statistics. This information helps us understand visitor behavior and improve the overall website experience.

We may also use cookies and similar technologies to enhance website functionality, remember user preferences, improve navigation, and analyze website performance. Cookies do not typically contain information that directly identifies an individual.

When you voluntarily submit information through contact forms, enquiry forms, consultation requests, newsletter subscriptions, or other communication channels, we may collect personal information including:

Name

Company Name

Email Address

Phone Number

Job Title

Business Address

Industry Information

Any additional information voluntarily provided by you

How We Use Your Information

Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP may use collected information for the following purposes:

Responding to enquiries and consultation requests

Providing information regarding products, technologies, services, and solutions

Facilitating customer support and communication

Improving website functionality and user experience

Conducting market research and business analysis

Sharing technical updates, event information, and company announcements

Maintaining records of customer interactions

Supporting sales, marketing, and business development activities

Complying with applicable legal and regulatory obligations

We process information only for legitimate business purposes and strive to ensure that collected data is relevant and necessary.

Information Sharing

Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP does not sell, rent, or trade personal information to third parties.

Information may be shared with trusted service providers, technology partners, website hosting providers, analytics providers, or professional advisors when necessary to operate our business and deliver services. Such parties are required to maintain confidentiality and protect personal information in accordance with applicable laws and contractual obligations.

Information may also be disclosed where required by law, legal process, regulatory authorities, or to protect the rights, safety, property, and legitimate interests of Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP.

Data Security

We implement reasonable technical, administrative, and organizational safeguards to protect information against unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your information, no method of internet transmission or electronic storage can be guaranteed to be completely secure. Users should exercise appropriate caution when transmitting information electronically.

Communications

When you contact Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP through our website, email, phone, or other communication channels, we may retain records of such correspondence for customer service, quality assurance, training, and business purposes.

We may occasionally communicate with you regarding products, services, technical information, events, webinars, or industry updates that may be relevant to your interests. You may request to opt out of non-essential communications at any time.

Third-Party Links

Our website may contain links to external websites operated by manufacturers, partners, industry organizations, technology providers, or other third parties.

Once you leave our website, we do not have control over external websites and cannot be responsible for their privacy practices, content, or security. We encourage users to review the privacy policies of any third-party websites they visit.

Cookies and Analytics

Our website may use cookies and analytics tools to understand visitor interactions and improve website performance.

These tools may collect anonymous information such as:

Pages visited

Time spent on pages

Device information

Browser information

General geographic region

Traffic sources

Users may choose to disable cookies through their browser settings, although certain website features may not function as intended.

Access, Correction and Removal of Information

You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of personal information that you have provided to Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP, subject to applicable legal, contractual, and regulatory requirements.

Requests may be submitted through the contact information provided below.

Please note that certain records may be retained where necessary for legitimate business purposes, legal compliance, dispute resolution, or contractual obligations.

International Users

Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP serves customers, partners, and organizations across various geographic regions. By using our website, you acknowledge that information may be processed and stored in jurisdictions where our service providers, technology partners, or business operations are located.

Changes to this Privacy Policy

Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP reserves the right to update, modify, or revise this Privacy Policy at any time without prior notice.

Any updates will be posted on this page along with the revised effective date. Continued use of the website following changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.

Contact Information

For any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, privacy practices, or requests related to your personal information, please contact:

Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP

Email: [shylender@skylifesciencessolutions.com](mailto:shylender@skylifesciencessolutions.com)

Phone: +91 9908140066

Website: [www.skylifesciencessolutions.com](https://www.skylifesciencessolutions.com)

Effective Date: July 2026

terms-conditions.content:

Submission of an enquiry does not create any contractual relationship or guarantee of service.

Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, special, or punitive damages arising from:

Use of the website

Inability to access the website

Users are encouraged to review the policies of any external websites they visit.

User Conduct

Users agree not to:

Attempt unauthorized access to website systems

Interfere with website operations

Use the website for unlawful activities

Changes to Terms

Continued use of the website following updates constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

Governing Law

cookie-policy.content:
Cookie Policy

Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP uses cookies and similar technologies to improve website functionality, enhance user experience, analyze website performance, and better understand visitor interactions.

This Cookie Policy explains how cookies are used when you visit our website.

What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember information about your visit and improve future browsing experiences.

Cookies generally do not contain information that directly identifies an individual user.

How We Use Cookies

Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP may use cookies to:

Improve website functionality

Remember user preferences

Enhance navigation and usability

Analyze website traffic and visitor behavior

Measure website performance

Maintain website security

Improve content relevance

Types of Cookies We Use

Essential Cookies

These cookies are necessary for the operation of the website and enable core functionality such as page navigation, security features, and access to certain website services.

Performance & Analytics Cookies

These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website by collecting anonymous information regarding page visits, traffic sources, user behavior, and website performance.

Functionality Cookies

These cookies remember preferences such as language settings, form information, and user choices to provide a more personalized experience.

Security Cookies

Security-related cookies may be used to help identify suspicious activity, protect against misuse, and improve website security.

Third-Party Cookies

Certain pages may include content, tools, maps, videos, social media integrations, or external services provided by third parties.

These third-party services may place their own cookies in accordance with their individual privacy policies.

Managing Cookies

Most web browsers allow users to control, block, or delete cookies through browser settings.

Users may:

Accept all cookies

Reject all cookies

Delete stored cookies

Configure notifications before cookies are stored

Please note that disabling cookies may affect website functionality and certain features may not operate as intended.

Analytics Services

Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP may use website analytics tools to better understand visitor behavior and improve website performance.

Information collected may include:

Pages viewed

Time spent on pages

Device type

Browser type

Approximate geographic region

Traffic source

This information is generally aggregated and does not personally identify individual visitors.

Updates to This Policy

Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP reserves the right to modify this Cookie Policy at any time.

Updates will be posted on this page and become effective immediately upon publication.

Contact Information

If you have questions regarding our use of cookies, please contact:

Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP

Email: [shylender@skylifesciencessolutions.com](mailto:shylender@skylifesciencessolutions.com)

Phone: +91 9908140066

Website: [www.skylifesciencessolutions.com](https://www.skylifesciencessolutions.com)

Effective Date: July 2026

accessibility.content:
Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP is committed to providing a website experience that is accessible, inclusive, and usable for all visitors, including individuals with disabilities.

We continuously work to improve the accessibility, usability, and overall user experience of our website by following recognized web accessibility principles and industry best practices.

Our goal is to ensure that users can access information, products, services, and resources regardless of the device, browser, or assistive technology being used.

We strive to support accessibility through:

Clear and readable content

Responsive mobile-friendly design

Logical website navigation

Keyboard-accessible functionality where possible

Readable color contrast and typography

Alternative text for relevant images

Consistent page layouts

Continuous accessibility improvements

While we make every effort to maintain and improve accessibility, some areas of the website may not yet fully meet every accessibility standard due to ongoing updates, third-party content, or technical limitations.

We are committed to identifying and addressing accessibility barriers wherever possible.

If you encounter difficulty accessing any information, feature, document, product brochure, or section of our website, we encourage you to contact us so that we can provide the information through an alternative method and work toward resolving the issue.

Feedback from users plays an important role in helping us improve accessibility and ensure a better experience for all visitors.

Contact Information

Sky Life Sciences Solutions LLP

Email: [shylender@skylifesciencessolutions.com](mailto:shylender@skylifesciencessolutions.com)

Phone: +91 9908140066

Website: [www.skylifesciencessolutions.com](https://www.skylifesciencessolutions.com)

We welcome feedback regarding the accessibility of our website and are committed to ongoing improvements that support equal access for all users.

Effective Date: July 2026
